backlog.title: Build Docker Compose stack for the full platform
backlog.description: Create platform/infra/docker-compose.yml that runs the entire District Award Travel stack in one command. Services needed: api (FastAPI on port 8000), db (SQLite via volume mount), redis (for task queues), scraper (Python scraping worker). Also create platform/infra/Dockerfile for the API service and platform/infra/start.sh as a single-command launcher. The goal: anyone can run ./start.sh and have the full platform running locally.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by mitchell on 2026-05-19. Files: docker-compose.yml, Dockerfile, start.sh

backlog.title: Build high-throughput FastAPI backend with async award search
backlog.description: Build platform/src/api/server.py as a high-performance async FastAPI application. Routes: GET /clients, POST /clients, GET /awards/search?origin=JFK&destination=NRT&cabin=F, GET /transfer-bonuses. Use SQLAlchemy async engine with SQLite. Add caching for award search results. Return results in under 100ms for cached queries.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by martin on 2026-05-20. Files: server.py, main.py

backlog.title: Build main business dashboard with live data
backlog.description: Build platform/public/index.html — the main District Award Travel operations dashboard. Sections: 1) Header with company name and live UTC clock 2) Stats row: total clients, active searches, bookings completed 3) Booking pipeline table: Client, Route, Cabin, Miles, Status 4) Award search results with value ratings. Dark theme: #080c10 bg, #00ff88 accent, #e8edf5 text. Full mock data if API offline.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by jeff on 2026-05-20. Files: index.html, styles.css, script.js

backlog.title: Build award valuation engine
backlog.description: Build platform/src/intelligence/valuation.py — a Python module that calculates the real-world value of any award flight. Input: {program, miles_required, cabin, route, taxes_usd}. Output: {cpp (cents per point), cash_equivalent_usd, verdict (EXCELLENT/GOOD/FAIR/SKIP), explanation}. Include cabin multipliers, fuel surcharge penalty, and a lookup table of known good redemptions. Include 10 sample valuations as tests at the bottom.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by jeff on 2026-05-20. Files: valuation.py

backlog.title: Build automated health check and monitoring script
backlog.description: Build platform/infra/healthcheck.py — a monitoring script that checks all system components and logs results. Check: FastAPI server on port 8000, database file exists and is writable, scraper workers running. Log all events to logs/healthcheck.log with timestamps.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by mitchell on 2026-05-19. Files: healthcheck.py, run_healthcheck.sh, cronjob

backlog.title: Build distributed award search pipeline
backlog.description: Build platform/src/pipeline/search_pipeline.py — a high-throughput award search orchestrator using a producer-consumer pattern. Producer pushes search jobs to a queue. Consumer workers pull jobs and execute searches. Design for 10 concurrent workers. Each worker searches one route and date combination and stores structured results to a SQLite database.
backlog.completion_summary: Completed by martin on 2026-05-20. Files: search_pipeline.py, db.py, main.py
